comment: SINGLE SOURCE for the JS/PHP price-model parity cases. smoke-test.js (JS priceBreakdown) and test-pricing.php (PHP price_breakdown) BOTH loop these cases, so the two engines are asserted against identical inputs and expectations. rate uses the PHP snake_case row shape; the JS loop maps it and ALSO asserts the shim's built-in rates match (so the two sides can never silently test different inputs). Dev/CI only — excluded from deploy.
